sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113071" key="xalkeuto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαλκ-ευτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n113071.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wrought of metal</tr_>: metaph., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στίχος Πιερίδων χ. ἐπ᾽ ἄκμοσιν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.409</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
